headline: PBJ vs. FTXG: How Have These Two Food & Beverage ETFs Stacked Up Against One Another (And the S&P 500?)
summary: PBJ offers greater liquidity and lower drawdown, while FTXG appeals to income investors with its 2.60% dividend yield.

headline: 1 ETF That Has Quietly Beaten the S&P 500 for a Decade
summary: Nearly 5 extra percentage points a year, compounded over a decade, is a life-changing difference.
